scenes.description: The Seese Pro blower resting horizontally on a clean matte white or light grey surface, shot from a slightly elevated 3/4 angle. A precision kitchen scale beside it displays '950g'. Clinical white light with soft shadows. No retail elements — the composition evokes a medical product assessment or lab review. The tool's form is central; nothing else in frame.
scenes.mood: Clinical, authoritative, quietly surprising — the weight figure does the emotional work

scenes.description: Split-screen illustration with a clean, editorial feel. Left panel: a man around 62 years old holding a traditional gas blower at arm's length — subtle visual indicators of back tension (slight forward lean, stiff arm). Muted, slightly cool tones. Right panel: the same man holding the Seese Pro one-handed with a relaxed, upright posture — arm slightly bent, shoulders down. Warm neutral tones. A thin vertical dividing line between panels. No text overlays needed — posture contrast speaks for itself.
scenes.mood: Objective, educational, clinical comparison — not dramatic, not exaggerated

scenes.description: Flat-lay on a neutral warm-white surface. Four items arranged horizontally left to right in descending size order: a full gas blower, a standard battery blower, a garden rake, and the Seese Pro. Each item has a small weight tag beneath it (e.g. '5.2 kg', '3.4 kg', '—', '950 g'). The Seese Pro is positioned last, slightly set apart with subtle negative space. Overhead shot, even lighting, no shadows. The weight tags are the only graphic elements.
scenes.mood: Clinical, factual, quietly impactful — the visual argument makes itself

scenes.description: A man or woman aged 60–65, dressed casually (weekend attire — flannel shirt or light cardigan), standing on a wooden deck surrounded by autumn leaves. They hold the Seese Pro in one hand, arm relaxed and slightly bent — never fully extended. Leaves visibly lift and scatter in front of them. Golden morning light (7–9am quality). The subject's posture is upright, expression calm and focused but not strained. Background: blurred treeline or fence with warm fall foliage.
scenes.mood: Warm, golden, effortless — a Saturday morning that feels manageable again

scenes.description: Clean medical-report style infographic on a warm off-white background. Three horizontal bar charts side by side, each representing one validated outcome measure (Oswestry Disability Index, QuickDASH, Task-Completion Confidence). Each chart shows baseline vs. week 8 vs. week 12 results. Color palette: muted navy and warm amber. Typography is clean and sans-serif. Small footnote references the 112-participant study. No stock icons — purely data-driven layout, designed like a clinical summary page.
scenes.mood: Evidence-based, trustworthy, reassuring — science without intimidation

scenes.description: Two side-by-side lifestyle panels in one composed image. Left panel: a man around 67, smiling naturally, one hand resting on the Seese Pro at his side, standing in front of a clean, leaf-free driveway — morning light, relaxed open expression, projecting quiet pride. Right panel: a woman around 63, using the Seese Pro to blow water droplets off a car hood after washing — droplets visible mid-air catching the light, expression satisfied and capable. Both subjects look dignified, active, and fully in control. Never staged or stock-photo in feel.
scenes.mood: Dignified, autonomous, quietly triumphant — independence as the emotional core

scenes.description: Flat-lay of the complete Seese Pro kit arranged neatly on a light grey linen or matte surface: the blower centered and prominent, rapid charger to its left, compact carry case open below it showing interior lining, and hearing protection to the right. Clean overhead shot with soft, even natural light. Items are slightly spaced — generous negative space between each. The composition feels considered and complete, like a professional unboxing, not a retail catalogue shot.
scenes.mood: Premium, complete, reassuring — everything you need, nothing superfluous

scenes.description: A senior homeowner, gender-neutral framing (shoot both if possible), standing at the edge of a freshly cleared patio or driveway in late morning autumn light. The Seese Pro hangs loosely and casually in one hand at their side — not displayed, just held. They are looking at their clean yard with a quiet, closed-lip expression of satisfaction. No drama, no performance. Background is softly blurred warm foliage and tidy outdoor space. The image should feel like a natural pause, not a posed moment.
scenes.mood: Serene, self-sufficient, complete — the emotional payoff of the entire advertorial
